posts.title: Foreign Swiss Billionaire Hansjörg Wyss Funneled Millions to Activist Groups Behind ‘No Kings’ Protests and Anti-Trump Lawsuits, Tax Filings Show. As a Swiss national, Wyss cannot contribute directly to federal candidates but can use his deep-pocketed nonprofit to influence US politics.

link_metadata.description: Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss funneled millions of dollars to the left-wing organizations that are organizing the anti-Donald Trump "No Kings" protests and spearheading lawsuits targeting President Trump's immigration and energy policies, according to new tax filings obtained by the Washington Free Beacon. They reveal the extent to which Wyss, a foreign national, is central to anti-Trump resistance efforts.
